title: MikroTik MTP250-26V94-OD, Outdoor AC/DC power supply, 26V, 250W
description: Outdoor AC/DC power supply in a durable metal chassis with output voltage 26 V , max. output current 9.4 A, total power 250 W suitable for a series of netPower products from MikroTik. The chassis is IP67 certified with extra protection against dust and moisture. The power supply is terminated by two stripped cables without connectors - input 3-core AC cable 230 V AC (100 - 240 V AC) and output DC cable
specsSearch: Power Power [W] 250 Output Voltage [V] 26 Output Current [A] 9,4
